blocks.text: Ventura, Reitan Chase Masters Glory in Texas — Carlsen Enters Freestyle Arena

A quiet Thursday with two compelling Norwegian storylines: Ventura and Reitan tee off in San Antonio chasing vital Masters prep points, while Carlsen steps into Grenke's engine-defying Freestyle format — a format tailor-made to test pure chess creativity.
⛳ Valero Texas Open — Kristoffer Ventura & Kristoffer Reitan tee off at TPC San Antonio, Masters warm-up on the line | 06:00
♟️ Grenke Chess Festival 2026 — Magnus Carlsen opens Freestyle Open A campaign in Karlsruhe; unconventional format suits his creative genius | 18:45
The Cycling Spring Classics rolls on through Belgium — Jonas Abrahamsen and Andreas Leknessund among eight Norwegians still in contention as the cobblestone season nears its climax on April 26.
